item.description: South Carolina Governor Henry McMaster appoints Darline Graham Nordone, Sen. Lindsey Graham's younger sister, to serve the remainder of the late Republican senator's term, which ends early January 2027.

media:content.media:title: S.C. Gov McMaster appoints Darline Graham Nordone to fill Sen. Lindsey Graham's seat
media:content.media:description: South Carolina Governor Henry McMaster appoints Darline Graham Nordone, Sen. Lindsey Graham's younger sister, to serve the remainder of the late Republican senator's term, which ends early January 2027.

item.title: S.C. Gov McMaster appoints Darline Graham Nordone to fill Sen. Lindsey Graham's seat

item.description: President Trump said the U.S. will reinstate a naval blockade on Iranian ships in the Strait of Hormuz amid ongoing attacks between the U.S. and Iran. NBC News' Matt Bradley reports on the ongoing power struggle for control of the strait.

media:content.media:title: Trump says U.S. will launch an 'Iranian blockade' in the Strait of Hormuz
media:content.media:description: President Trump said the U.S. will reinstate a naval blockade on Iranian ships in the Strait of Hormuz amid ongoing attacks between the U.S. and Iran. NBC News' Matt Bradley reports on the ongoing power struggle for control of the strait.

item.title: Trump says U.S. will launch an 'Iranian blockade' in the Strait of Hormuz

item.dc:creator: Steve Kopack
item.description: The price of oil jumped after President Trump declared on social media that the U.S. would be “reimbursed” for helping ships transit the Strait of Hormuz.

media:content.media:description: Vessels anchored Sunday in the Strait of Hormuz off Bandar Abbas, Iran.

item.title: Oil surges more than 9% after Trump reimposes Iran blockade

item.dc:creator: Gary Grumbach
Dareh Gregorian
item.description: A federal judge in Florida has found President Donald Trump’s lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service was brought in “bad faith” for an “improper purpose.”

media:content.media:text: Donald Trump as seen from the side, standing in between white columns
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump at the White House in Washington, D.C., on July 6.

item.title: Judge says Trump admin attempted to ‘manipulate the judicial process’ with its IRS settlement

item.description: A person has been reportedly shot and killed in an incident involving an ICE agent in Biddeford, Maine. NBC News' Julia Ainsley has early details on the incident and how local and federal authorities are responding.

media:content.media:title: Person reportedly shot and killed in incident involving ICE agent in Maine
media:content.media:description: A person has been reportedly shot and killed in an incident involving an ICE agent in Biddeford, Maine. NBC News' Julia Ainsley has early details on the incident and how local and federal authorities are responding.

item.title: Person reportedly shot and killed in incident involving ICE agent in Maine

item.description: Twelve state attorneys general filed a lawsuit challenging Paramount Skydance’s $110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery. NBC News' Allie Canal breaks down how the lawsuit says consumers could be impacted and what it could mean for Paramount.

media:content.media:title: 12 states file lawsuit to block $110 billion Paramount-Warner Bros. merger
media:content.media:description: Twelve state attorneys general filed a lawsuit challenging Paramount Skydance’s $110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery. NBC News' Allie Canal breaks down how the lawsuit says consumers could be impacted and what it could mean for Paramount.

item.title: 12 states file lawsuit to block $110 billion Paramount-Warner Bros. merger

item.description: Sam Neill, the New Zealand actor known for playing Dr. Alan Grant in the “Jurassic Park” movies, has died at 78. “The loss was sudden and unexpected,” Neill’s family said in a statement. NBC’s Kaylee Hartung reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Sam Neill, Actor Known For ‘Jurassic Park,’ Dies at 78
media:content.media:description: Sam Neill, the New Zealand actor known for playing Dr. Alan Grant in the “Jurassic Park” movies, has died at 78. “The loss was sudden and unexpected,” Neill’s family said in a statement. NBC’s Kaylee Hartung reports for TODAY.

item.title: Sam Neill, Actor Known For ‘Jurassic Park,’ Dies at 78

item.description: Una de las rivalidades más apasionantes del fútbol mundial vuelve a arder esta Copa con la Semifinal; tres derrotas y dos victorias pesan en la memoria de la "Albiceleste", que llega con todo el fuego de la historia para escribir una nueva página épica.

media:content.media:title: Argentina por la historia: las 5 veces que se ha enfrentado a Inglaterra en los Mundiales
media:content.media:description: Una de las rivalidades más apasionantes del fútbol mundial vuelve a arder esta Copa con la Semifinal; tres derrotas y dos victorias pesan en la memoria de la "Albiceleste", que llega con todo el fuego de la historia para escribir una nueva página épica.

item.title: Argentina por la historia: las 5 veces que se ha enfrentado a Inglaterra en los Mundiales

item.description: El histórico goleador de la Selección Argentina recordó cómo vivió los duelos ante Inglaterra en los Mundiales, el entorno que rodea esta rivalidad y lo que comparte con Lionel Scaloni de cara a la Semifinal de la Copa del Mundo de este miércoles.

media:content.media:title: Batistuta: "La rivalidad sirve para alimentar el deseo de ganar" | Rumbo a la Gran Final
media:content.media:description: El histórico goleador de la Selección Argentina recordó cómo vivió los duelos ante Inglaterra en los Mundiales, el entorno que rodea esta rivalidad y lo que comparte con Lionel Scaloni de cara a la Semifinal de la Copa del Mundo de este miércoles.

item.title: Batistuta: "La rivalidad sirve para alimentar el deseo de ganar" | Rumbo a la Gran Final

item.description: La cámara de los árbitros en la Copa del Mundo 2026 nos regaló una perspectiva muy distinta de los golazos que se marcaron en esta edición… Es IMPERDIBLE.

media:content.media:title: Los goles de Messi y Mbappé en el Mundial como nunca antes los habías visto
media:content.media:description: La cámara de los árbitros en la Copa del Mundo 2026 nos regaló una perspectiva muy distinta de los golazos que se marcaron en esta edición… Es IMPERDIBLE.

item.title: Los goles de Messi y Mbappé en el Mundial como nunca antes los habías visto

item.description: El seleccionado francés es el equipo que mejor fútbol ha jugado y ser muy fuerte en todas sus líneas, además que cualquiera de sus jugadores pueden marcar la diferencia.

media:content.media:title: Ramiro Córdoba: “Francia es muy favorita sobre España” | El Pelotazo
media:content.media:description: El seleccionado francés es el equipo que mejor fútbol ha jugado y ser muy fuerte en todas sus líneas, además que cualquiera de sus jugadores pueden marcar la diferencia.

item.title: Ramiro Córdoba: “Francia es muy favorita sobre España” | El Pelotazo

item.description: El seleccionado paraguayo sorprendió al mundo al eliminar a Alemania y plantarle cara a Francia, demostrando un gran crecimiento con jugadores que militan en las mejores ligas

media:content.media:title: Roque Santa Cruz: “Paraguay dio un paso importante” | Rumbo a la gran final
media:content.media:description: El seleccionado paraguayo sorprendió al mundo al eliminar a Alemania y plantarle cara a Francia, demostrando un gran crecimiento con jugadores que militan en las mejores ligas

item.title: Roque Santa Cruz: “Paraguay dio un paso importante” | Rumbo a la gran final

item.description: El experto analizó el desempeño del seleccionado canalero y aunque reconoció un crecimiento, también sabe que necesitan apoyar el proyecto y no truncarlo.

media:content.media:title: Dely Valdés: “Faltó el gol de Panamá” | Rumbo a la gran final
media:content.media:description: El experto analizó el desempeño del seleccionado canalero y aunque reconoció un crecimiento, también sabe que necesitan apoyar el proyecto y no truncarlo.

item.title: Dely Valdés: “Faltó el gol de Panamá” | Rumbo a la gran final

item.description: Nuestro experto resaltó la actuación frente a Alemania, pero dejó mucho que desear ante Cabo Verde y ante México, pero confía en que para el próximo mundial serán un equipo más fuerte.

media:content.media:title: Antonio Valencia: “Es hora de que Ecuador gane algo” | Rumbo a la gran final
media:content.media:description: Nuestro experto resaltó la actuación frente a Alemania, pero dejó mucho que desear ante Cabo Verde y ante México, pero confía en que para el próximo mundial serán un equipo más fuerte.

item.title: Antonio Valencia: “Es hora de que Ecuador gane algo” | Rumbo a la gran final

item.description: El exfutbolista reconoce que la Canarinha ha perdido la esencia que tantos títulos les dio y su eliminación temprana causó mucha tristeza.

media:content.media:title: Dunga: “Brasil debe volver a ser Brasil” | Rumbo a la Gran Final
media:content.media:description: El exfutbolista reconoce que la Canarinha ha perdido la esencia que tantos títulos les dio y su eliminación temprana causó mucha tristeza.

item.title: Dunga: “Brasil debe volver a ser Brasil” | Rumbo a la Gran Final

item.description: La polémica en las decisiones arbitrales han estado a la orden del día en la presente Copa Mundial, pero un experto nos aclara a quién ha perjudicado y a quién ha favorecido.

media:content.media:title: ¿A quién ha favorecido el arbitraje? Martín Vázquez nos dice | Rumbo a la Gran Final
media:content.media:description: La polémica en las decisiones arbitrales han estado a la orden del día en la presente Copa Mundial, pero un experto nos aclara a quién ha perjudicado y a quién ha favorecido.

item.title: ¿A quién ha favorecido el arbitraje? Martín Vázquez nos dice | Rumbo a la Gran Final

item.description: En Rumbo a la Gran Final repasamos a las cinco aficiones que más color, pasión y emoción llevaron a los estadios durante la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. Más de seis millones de aficionados asistieron al torneo, pero estas dejaron una huella imborrable.

media:content.media:title: Las 5 aficiones que conquistaron la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026 | Rumbo a la Gran Final
media:content.media:description: En Rumbo a la Gran Final repasamos a las cinco aficiones que más color, pasión y emoción llevaron a los estadios durante la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. Más de seis millones de aficionados asistieron al torneo, pero estas dejaron una huella imborrable.

item.title: Las 5 aficiones que conquistaron la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026 | Rumbo a la Gran Final

item.description: The New Year's Eve ball in Times Square has dropped for America's 250th anniversary, making this the first time the ball has dropped outside of a New Year's celebration.

media:content.media:title: New Year's Eve ball drops in Times Square for America's 250th
media:content.media:description: The New Year's Eve ball in Times Square has dropped for America's 250th anniversary, making this the first time the ball has dropped outside of a New Year's celebration.

item.title: New Year's Eve ball drops in Times Square for America's 250th

item.dc:creator: Gary Grumbach
Dareh Gregorian
item.description: A federal judge in Florida has found President Donald Trump’s lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service was brought in “bad faith” for an “improper purpose.”

media:content.media:text: Donald Trump as seen from the side, standing in between white columns
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump at the White House in Washington, D.C., on July 6.

item.title: Judge says Trump admin attempted to ‘manipulate the judicial process’ with its IRS settlement

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Shabad
item.description: The announcement from Gov. Henry McMaster came after President Donald Trump recommended Graham’s sister, Darline Graham Nordone, for the temporary position.

media:content.media:text: at the announcement of his presidential campaign in 2015.
media:content.media:description: Sen. Lindsey Graham, R-S.C., and his sister, Darline Graham Nordone, at the announcement of his presidential campaign in 2015.

item.title: South Carolina governor appoints Lindsey Graham’s sister to finish his Senate term

item.dc:creator: Suzanne Gamboa
Nicole Acevedo
item.description: A man targeted by immigration authorities was killed in a shooting involving ICE officers Monday morning in Biddeford, Maine, local and state government officials said.

media:content.media:text: Image: Trump Administration Officially Launches Chicago Immigration Operation
media:content.media:description: Marcos Charles, an ICE official, speaks with the press near the Cook County jail and courthouse complex, in Chicago, on Sept. 8, 2025.

item.title: Fatal shooting involving ICE officers under investigation in Maine

item.dc:creator: Steve Kopack
item.description: The price of oil jumped after President Trump declared on social media that the U.S. would be “reimbursed” for helping ships transit the Strait of Hormuz.

media:content.media:description: Vessels anchored Sunday in the Strait of Hormuz off Bandar Abbas, Iran.

item.title: Oil surges more than 9% after Trump reimposes Iran blockade

item.dc:creator: Minyvonne Burke
item.description: Jay-Z apologized to fans after an hourslong delay at his Sunday night show, telling the crowd at Yankee Stadium that a safety issue prompted security to close the doors.

media:content.media:text: F1 Grand Prix of Las Vegas
media:content.media:description: Jay-Z looks on prior to the F1 Grand Prix of Las Vegas at Las Vegas Strip Circuit on November 22, 2025 in Las Vegas, Nevada.

item.title: Jay-Z apologizes after Yankee Stadium show starts hours late, says there was a safety issue

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Cohen
Austin Mullen
item.description: Wai Ching Ho, the actor known for her work in Marvel projects including “Daredevil,” has died, her family said.

media:content.media:description: Wai Ching Ho attends Marvel's "Iron Fist" New York screening in 2017.

item.title: Marvel actor Wai Ching Ho dies at 82

item.dc:creator: Harry Rabinowitz
item.description: I tested nearly a dozen point-and-shoot cameras from Kodak, Fujifilm, Sony, Leica, and Ricoh to find the perfect balance of size and quality.

media:content.media:text: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.
media:content.media:description: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.

media:content.media:text: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.
media:content.media:description: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.

media:content.media:text: A wide angle photo of the Radio City Music Hall neon sign at night, with people and cars blurred in motion.
media:content.media:description: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.

media:content.media:text: A photo of green and red houses along a river in a city.
media:content.media:description: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.

media:content.media:text: A photo of a musician playing electric guitar on a stage with blue and green flood lights in the background.
media:content.media:description: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.

media:content.media:text: A close up of sparkling water in an old-fashioned mason jar glass, photographed in black and white.
media:content.media:description: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.

media:content.media:text: A video of the writer at different moments in their work day — commuting, in an elevator and with co-workers.
media:content.media:description: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.

media:content.media:text: A photo of two hawks sitting high up on a tree branch
media:content.media:description: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.

media:content.media:text: A headshot of the writer wearing black sunglasses, looking away to the right of the camera.
media:content.media:description: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.

media:content.media:text: A close up of a man with his arms crossed sitting at a marble white table.
media:content.media:description: My top picks are easy to use and fun for both beginners and experts.

item.title: The best point-and-shoot cameras of 2026 are compact and easy to use
